title: Model E baby-sitting droid

'''Model E baby-sitting droids''' were designed by [[AccuTronics/Legends|AccuTronics]] as a play-mate and a baby-sitter to young children.

==Description==
Model Es were small [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]], standing less than a [[Meter/Legends|meter]] in height, and were designed to appear as non-threatening as possible. Constructed of [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] which was coated in sturdy [[Plastic/Legends|plastic]], the droid's chassis was smooth and rounded. Each Model E had two [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and two legs which terminated in large feet.<ref name="EGTD" />

Large, bright light yellow<ref name="Droids5" /> [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]] dominated the head of the Model E, and their plating was brightly [[Color/Legends|colored]] in hues such as red, yellow, green, blue, orange, and pink. They had an oversized head, with a cube-shaped [[Personality matrix/Legends|personality matrix]] nestled inside and well-protected. The matrix was not sophisticated, but well suited to the Model E's role. It allowed the droid to accurately read the emotions of the children under its care and determined the best way to make friends.<ref name="EGTD" />

The droid's [[Databank/Legends|databanks]] were filled with information on thousands of children's games, sports, and hobbies, including [[Alderaan's Arch]], [[zizzledy box]], and [[Hound the Hawk-bat]]. They were also well equipped to educate, taking their charges on nature walks, supervising exercise, and they were fully capable of performing tasks including feeding, diaper changes, and even emergency medicine.<ref name="EGTD" />

The Model E's [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] was keyed to give the droids a genial and gentle voice. The unit was also capable of synthesizing the sounds of [[Music/Legends|musical]] instruments, allowing them to provide accompaniment when singing songs they knew from numerous [[Alien/Legends|alien]] cultures.<ref name="EGTD" />

==Role==
Model E droids were intended to interact primarily with young children, acting both as playmates and as secondary caregivers. They were therefore found mainly in schools and childcare centers, although many [[Medcenter/Legends|medcenters]] specializing in pediatric care had Model Es in their recovery wards. [[Psych-counselor]]s utilized the non-threatening droids to put children suffering from trauma at ease.<ref name="EGTD" />

Wealthy parents were also known to purchase Model Es to act as companions for their offspring. Children fell in love with the squat droids, and would often become emotionally attached to their Model Es. As a result the droids were rarely subjected to [[Memory wipe/Legends|memory wipes]].<ref name="EGTD" />

==History==
Model Es were first produced well over a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. While long out of production by that time, a number of units were still operational and they had taken roles looking after the children and grandchildren of their original charges. If a number of Model Es served together, they often bonded and became inseparable.<ref name="EGTD" />

A [[33 BBY/Legends|year]] before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Corulag Academy|Academy]] on [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] had several Model Es stationed in the [[Science Service]] tower in order to baby-sit the children of Science Service scholars and employees. The droids helped the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Vel Ardox]], [[Noro Zak]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and the pilots [[Bama Vook]] and [[Leeper]] to evacuate the children from the tower during the [[Bartokk]]s' attempt to destroy the Academy.<ref name="Emergency">''[[Episode I Adventures 4: Jedi Emergency]]''</ref>

Three Model E droids—[[U-E]], [[2-E]], and [[Q-E]]—operated a [[Kalarba nursery|nursery]] in a town on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]].<ref name="EGTD" /> In [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]],<ref name="Omnibus">''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Droids]]''</ref> a local criminal and weapons manufacturer, [[Vuldo]], attempted to coerce the three droids into building illegal [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. Vuldo blasted U-E into pieces, and the other two droids were forced to obey although they managed to recover U-E's [[Droid brain/Legends|cognitive module]] and keep it safe. When Vuldo's scheme was foiled by [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and [[Nak Pitareeze]], U-E's module was successfully implanted into the body of a hulking [[Loader droid/Legends|freight droid]].<ref name="Droids5" />
